Stablecoin infrastructure
for the
new economy
All-in-one platform for companies and agents to integrate stablecoin rails — including wallets, onramps, stablecoin orchestration & more.
Let's Chat
Start Building
Trusted by 40,000+ enterprises and developers
A fully integrated
suite
of products
Wallet Infrastructure
Create programmable wallets for users, agents, or backend operations.
Wallets
Onramps and payments
Headless APIs and widgets to convert fiat to stablecoins, and sell digital assets.
On and Offramps
Checkout
Tokenization
Mint tokens and verifiable credentials with APIs and no-code tools.
Tokenization Tools
Embedded Wallets
Create wallets for your users or AI agents
Treasury Wallets
Manage and automate your company’s treasury
Orchestration
Manage and send stablecoins globally with instant settlement
Onramp
Embed plug-and-play stablecoin ramps anywhere
Offramp
Convert stablecoins into local currency
Token Checkout
Allow users to buy digital assets with fiat
Agentic Cards
Issue virtual cards for AI agents
Contact us
Need a custom solution?
Let’s chat.
To build
stablecoin
and
agentic payment
solutions
Remittances
Enable faster and cheaper global transfers, plus wallets for recipients.
Agentic Payments
Give financial skills to your agents with a secure payments toolkit
Payroll
Send instant, global payouts to workers and contractors.
Neobanks
Build a global neobank with wallets, payments, yield, and more.
Stablecoins payouts
Pay users or businesses globally with stablecoins.
Treasury management
Run global treasury operations 24/7 with stablecoin efficiency.
Fintechs
Add stablecoins into any product or money flow
Embed wallets and financial services
anywhere: deposits, yield, payments, cards, trading, and more.
Move money globally
faster and at a fraction of the cost with stablecoins — ideal for remittances and cross-border payments.
Agentic Finance
Turn agents into economic actors
Fund agents
and allow them to hold assets and transact securely.
Buy billions of items
via API using cards or stablecoins.
250+ plug-ins
: data feeds, trading, and more.
Licensed infrastructure to launch compliantly
All
US
Coverage for all United States including New York.
All
EU
Support for all 27 countries through MiCA.
160+
countries
Support for either direct onboarding or payouts.
Blockchain in the
backend.
None of the friction
Make the blockchain
invisible
No gas fees, approval prompts, or other blockchain gimmicks.
Go to market
faster
Integrate in minutes and be ready to scale to millions of users.
Gasless
. For you and your users
Crossmint pays for blockchains fees and bills you in fiat.
Unified
dashboards
All data in one place: wallets, payments, tokens.
Built for
enterprise
SOC2 Type II, GDPR. Four 9 SLAs.
Case studies
Powering the leading
companies building with
stablecoins
Learn how Moneygram launched stablecoin powered remittances in 60 days
MoneyGram uses Crossmint’s wallet and stablecoin orchestration infrastructure to power their MoneyGram app and move money faster at a fraction of the cost.
Explore
See how WireX is building a stablecoin neobank for businesses
WireX uses Crossmint's wallet infrastructure to provision next-gen treasury wallets for companies and retail customers.
Explore
How the Marshall Islands Launched the First Blockchain-Based UBI program with Crossmint
Crossmint wallet infrastructure powers the RMI’s first digital UBI program, letting citizens receive, store, and transfer U.S. dollar–denominated funds from their phones.
Explore
How fomo Became Crypto's Fastest-Growing Trading App With Crossmint Token Checkout
Fomo integrated Crossmint's fiat-to-crypto infrastructure to let anyone fund their account and buy tokens with Apple Pay—no KYC, no wallets, no friction.
Explore
See how Kasi Money is building a neobank for freelancers
Kasi Money uses Crossmint's wallet infrastructure to provision stablecoin accounts and low-cost remittances to users.
Explore
Learn how Ruvo (YC'S25) is helping Brazilians access dollars and move money globally
Ruvo helps Brazilians receive USD or crypto and instantly convert to Reais.
Explore
Access 25+ Case Studies
Backed by the best
Get started in
5 minutes.
Scale without limits
Let's Chat
Read the Docs
Don’t miss an update
Learn about new products and features

Frequently asked questions
Are there discounts for purchasing multiple products?
Yes. We offer custom bundle packages with discounted unit rates if you use multiple products.
What is a Monthly Active Wallet?
A wallet is active in a given month if it is included in an API request - including creation, fetching the address, fetching contents, signing a message, transaction, or transfer.
What are user fees on the payments products?
Fees for the checkout and onramp are generally paid for by users as a convenience fee - though you could subsidize them if you wish.
‍
Rates depend on the subscription plan and volume commitment, and are calculated on a per transaction basis depending on the card, geography, currency, blockchain, and multiple other factors. Contact us if you wish you discuss the right plan for you.
What if the features I need are not listed?
Reach out! We are constantly upgrading the platform and there's a chance what you need is live but unpublished. Otherwise, we may be able to prioritize it on the roadmap.
Get started in 10 minutes.
For free
.
All the power of Web3 with none of the hassle.
Start Building
Contact sales
Don’t miss an update

analysis.name: Crossmint
analysis.tagline: Stablecoin infrastructure for the new economy
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one platform for companies and AI agents to integrate stablecoin rails including wallets, onramps, orchestration, and tokenization via compliant APIs.
analysis.ideal_customer: Fintechs, neobanks, remittance providers, payroll platforms, and AI-agent builders needing compliant stablecoin infrastructure globally

differentiators: MiCA authorized across all 27 EU countries plus all US states including New York
Licensed infrastructure with 160+ country coverage and payouts to 170+ countries
Gasless UX: Crossmint pays blockchain fees and bills in fiat
All-in-one platform (wallets + onramps + orchestration + tokenization + agentic cards) replacing multiple vendors
Unified dashboards spanning wallets, payments, and tokens
SOC2 Type II, GDPR, four 9s SLA — enterprise-grade compliance
Purpose-built for agentic finance with 250+ agent plug-ins and virtual cards for AI agents
Integrate in minutes / go live in 5 minutes

praised: MoneyGram launched stablecoin-powered remittances in 60 days
fomo became 'crypto's fastest-growing trading app' using Token Checkout with Apple Pay, no KYC or wallets required

Changelog page returns 404; no public shipping cadence visible
Integrations directory returns 404 — third-party partners not enumerated publicly

free_tier.limits: 1,000 free monthly active wallets + up to 2,000 transactions

tiers.name: Wallets — Developer / Get Started
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1,000 free MAWs, up to 2,000 transactions, smart wallets, non-custodial keys

tiers.name: Wallets — Custom (Enterprise)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Starts at $0.05/MAW with volume discounts; treasury wallets, policy engine, AML, delegated signers

tiers.name: On/Offramps — Custom
tiers.headline_inclusions: Per-transaction fees with volume tiers; whitelabel, 160+ country coverage, chargeback protection

tiers.name: Stablecoin Orchestration — Custom
tiers.headline_inclusions: Per-transaction fees; treasury, payouts to 170+ countries, AML, travel rule, 50+ chain support

tiers.name: Checkout — Developer
tiers.headline_inclusions: Hosted checkout, cards + crypto + Apple/Google Pay, NFT/fungible/physical products

tiers.name: Checkout — Custom (Enterprise)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Embedded/headless, ACH, chargeback protection, advanced analytics, secondary sales

tiers.name: Tokenization — Developer
tiers.headline_inclusions: Starts at $0.01/action; mint/edit/burn tokens, 10MB metadata, 100/hour rate limit

tiers.name: Tokenization — Scale (Enterprise)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Volume discounts, up to 2.5m/hour, batch minting, private/non-transferable tokens, BYO contract

tiers.name: Enterprise Support
tiers.headline_inclusions: 24/7 support, dedicated team, premium SLAs, roadmap prioritization, network access

pricing.notes: Usage-based across all products (per-MAW, per-transaction, per-mint-action). Free tier: 1,000 MAWs + 2,000 transactions for wallets, $0.01/action for tokenization. Fees typically passed to end users on checkout/onramp. Bundle discounts available for multi-product customers. No published seat pricing — this is usage/consumption billing.
